name: Herbed Rice Cake Snacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rice cakes on a baking sheet.
2. Blend the remaining ingredients together.
3. Spread evenly on the rice cakes.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 3 to 5 minutes.
Each serving provides:
122 calories
3.3 g. protein
6.4 g. fat
13.2 g. carbohydrate
183 mg. sodium
16 mg. cholesterol
Source: Sport Sense - The Common Sense Approach to a Healthful Lifestyle
Reprinted with permission from The USA Rice Council
